name: OwlyWriter AI
highlight_text: Owlywriter AI is best for automating content generation
description:
What OwlyWriter AI Does

Owly Writer AI was developed by Hootsuite as an AI tool that generates content ideas for social media. Using GPT technology, Owly Writer can help you: 

  • Generate content ideas
  • Convert existing content into multiple formats
  • Rewrite and repurpose top-performing posts.

Note of caution: Owlywriter's content will be detected as 100% AI-written.
‍

Source: Mediaweek

Key Features

  • Repurpose top-performing posts
  • Write captions and other important post elements
  • Generate content ideas 
  • Produce topical social posts 

Benefits of OwlyWriter AI

  • Owlywriter AI can repurpose top-performing posts into new posts to recreate the success—but without duplicating the original post.
  • Captions generator with step-by-step tutorials. 
  • Content ideas generator to beat writers blog and keep your brain juice flowing.
  • Owlywriter AI can write a social post based on a webpage or a recent post.

Pricing

Hootsuite offers Owlywriter free to its customers for a limited period.

Pros

✅AI tools for content writing 

✅Useful automation features to minimize routine writing tasks 

Cons

🚫Content is 100% AI-written

🚫Only available to Hootsuite customers at the moment

🚫Limited features - only a writing tool
